folio.label: 80r
folio.l: And nyl hi~ seluen , do no gentil dedes
Ne folwe his gentil auncetrye , that ded is
He is nat gentil , be he Duke or Erl
For vyleyns synful dedes , maken a Cherl
For gentilnesse , nys but renounee
Of thyn Auncestres , for here heye bounte
Whicú is a straunge thyngö , to thy ¹sone
Thy gentilnesse cometú , fro god allone
Thanne cometú oonly , oure gentilnesse of grace
It was no thyngö be quethed vs , w oure place
Thynketú how noble , as seitú Valerius
Was thilke Tullius hostilius
That out of pouäte roos , to heygú noblesse
Redetú Senek , and redetú eke Boece
There shul ©e sen expässe , that no dred is
That he is gentil , that dotú gentil dedis

note.notetxt: 1142There is a sign in the right margin to indicate a nota in the same ink.ODR

folio.l: And therfore leue husbonde , I thus conclude
Al were it , that myne Auncestres weren rude
ñet may the heye god , and so hope I
Graunte me grace , to lyuen vertuously
Than am I gentil , whan that I begynne
To lyuen vertuously , and weyven synne
¢ And there as ©e , of pouäte me repreeue
The heye god , on whom that we byleue
In wylful pouert , ches to leue his lyf´
And certes euäy man , Mayden or wyf
May vnderstonde , that Iúc heuene kyngö
Ne wolde nat chese , a vicious lyuyngö
Glad pouerte , is an honest thyngö certeyn
This wol Senek , and othere clerkes seyn
Who so that halt hi~ paid , of his pouertepouertpouerte1158Double chek correction against the manuscript.ODR
I hold hi~ riche , al had he nougút a shert
He that coueytetú , is a pore wygút
For he wold han , that is nougút in his mygút
But he that nougút hatú , ne coueytetú to haue
Is riche , al thougú he©eh©e hold hi~ but a knaue
Verray synne issynne ispouäte , is synne is synne ¸prely
Iuuenal speketú , of pouäte merily
The pore man , whan he gotú by the wey
Byfore the theues , he may synge & pley
Pouerte is hateful good , and as I gesse
A ful greet bryngere , out of besynesse
A gret amendere eke , of sapience
To hi~ that taketú it , in pacience
Pouäte is this , al thougú it seme alenge
Possessiou~ , that no wygút wol chalenge
Pouäte ful often , whan a man is lowe

note.notetxt: 1174these last lines are written in a smaller size, but there is not a specific compression. Double check.ODR
